title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell argues that software engineering is shifting from manual coding to AI agent management, with Cursor data showing 30% of PRs are fully agent-developed and enterprise AI-generated code rose from 15% to 75% in one year. Engineers are increasingly becoming managers of autonomous agent teams rather than direct coders.
